title: After the Oka Sho: A Blossoming Smile

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Phew.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(My arms and legs feel so heavy... and my heart's
still racing. But... I'm okay.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (I have to go to where Trainer's waiting for me!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm overwhelmed. Even though her opponents
were older, she breezed past them with ease.
Watching her running so earnestly and
purposefully...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Has filled me with courage and confidence.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Um...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
choice_data_list: Thank you for giving me courage.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I've always felt this way, but I'm so glad you're my
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Of all the times we could have met, I'm so glad it
was now!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Do you remember what happened after the
Hanshin Juvenile Fillies?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...I'll tell you after the Oka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't help but think things like, "Why does it
have to be now?"

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
"I wish I'd become race-ready after I'd grown
bigger. Trainer's been working so hard, but look
at me." That's the kind of stuff I was worrying
about.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've had similar thoughts before too. "If only I had
met her when I had more experience as a
trainer..."

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Everyone says that it's great that I was able to
skip grades. But now, I'm at a disadvantage.
Things are so much harder for me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: But I'm sure... it had to be now.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Because of you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It's because I skipped grades and entered Tracen
early that I could meet you—my kind,
hard-working trainer who's always worrying about
me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Things aren't easy for you either, but you still do
everything you can for me...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
When you're with me, I feel like... I can keep
pushing myself to work harder.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I think the reason I became race-ready before the
others my age...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...was so I could meet you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
That's why all of the cheers I received today are
yours.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: They're proof of how wonderful a trainer you are!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yes. Trainer, you're incredible.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I mean, just look at how far you've brought me,
despite how small I am!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to keep working even harder from now
on!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for devoting so much of yourself to
helping me. I appreciate everything you've done!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower is always like this. It was a race she
could only ever run once in her life, and she ran it
for me.
choice_data_list:
Then the reason you decided to run in a G1
race...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I thought it would help you if I won
something big.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
And once I won, everyone would learn what a
wonderful trainer you are. ♪
choice_data_list: Why are you willing to go so far for me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To put it bluntly, I only became her trainer by
chance. Why would she care so much about
someone she was randomly assigned to?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Why?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Because you do your best for me. You believe in
me, and you really care.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Is it weird to want the best for the person who's
always stayed by my side and treated me so
kindly?
choice_data_list: No, not at all! Thank you, Flower!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You don't need to thank me. I'm just doing what I
want to do.
choice_data_list: I'm so glad that we met each other now! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm glad too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her kindness runs far deeper than I had imagined.
Though I'm grateful for her, I've also been made
painfully aware of my own inexperience.
choice_data_list:
(I want to become a trainer who can support
her.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now, more than ever, I'm determined to become
a better trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer. I'd like to stick to this path we're on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since the Oka Sho is over, continuing this path
means our next goal will be the second race of
the Triple Tiara—the Japanese Oaks.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Right now, I feel like my legs can take me
anywhere!
choice_data_list: All right! Then let's take on the Japanese Oaks!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yes, let's!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: All right! I'm going to get changed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But as I watch Nishino Flower walk away, I can't
help but feel a small seed of anxiety growing
inside of me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Of all the races she's run so far, this will be her
first medium-distance race. Will she be able to
perform her best?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Either way, if she's looking toward the future,
then there's nothing to do but forge on ahead
together.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hello, little gerberas. You're all blooming so
beautifully. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to keep doing my best, so that you can
have plenty of friends blooming alongside you...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: And that means winning the Japanese Oaks!
